description: Update crosswalk_agentzero_apex.md with actual APEX implementation status, evidence links, and parity scores.

description: Update crosswalk_hermes_apex.md with actual APEX implementation status, evidence links, and parity scores.

title: Create governance charter
description: Create GOVERNANCE_CHARTER.md defining governance structure, roles, decision-making process, and amendment procedures.

title: Define governance cadence
description: Document governance meeting cadence, review cycles, and reporting requirements in GOVERNANCE_CADENCE.md.

title: Create Phase 8 runbook
description: Create runbook for governance incident response: policy violations, charter amendments, crosswalk updates.

title: Phase 8 gate review
description: Run gate review against criteria 8.1-8.3. Document results in phase8_gating.md. Get sign-off to proceed to Phase 9.
